creator: kurt.lidl@cello.com
text:
On 3/23/2012 5:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-Template-Mustache,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166362 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166362
>
This  changeset looks good to me.  Please apply it.

-Kurt
